'''âj-s-m-h''' ('''kajasmehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vamouse|vamouse]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-s-m-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vamouse|vamouse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-s-m-h
|-
! Lemma
| kajasmehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijasmehoko|thijasmehoko]] || [[word:jijasmehoko|jijasmehoko]] || [[word:shijasmehoko|shijasmehoko]] || [[word:kijasmehoko|kijasmehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujasmehoko|thuthujasmehoko]] || [[word:jujujasmehoko|jujujasmehoko]] || [[word:shushujasmehoko|shushujasmehoko]] || [[word:kukujasmehoko|kukujasmehoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojasmehoko|thojasmehoko]] || [[word:jojasmehoko|jojasmehoko]] || [[word:shojasmehoko|shojasmehoko]] || [[word:kojasmehoko|kojasmehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjasmehoko|thĂŠjasmehoko]] || [[word:jĂŠjasmehoko|jĂŠjasmehoko]] || [[word:shĂŠjasmehoko|shĂŠjasmehoko]] || [[word:kĂŠjasmehoko|kĂŠjasmehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajasmehoko|thathajasmehoko]] || [[word:jajajasmehoko|jajajasmehoko]] || [[word:shashajasmehoko|shashajasmehoko]] || [[word:kakajasmehoko|kakajasmehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajasmehoko|thajasmehoko]] || [[word:jajasmehoko|jajasmehoko]] || [[word:shajasmehoko|shajasmehoko]] || [[word:kajasmehoko|kajasmehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajasmehoko|thajasmehoko]] || [[word:jajasmehoko|jajasmehoko]] || [[word:shajasmehoko|shajasmehoko]] || [[word:kajasmehoko|kajasmehoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
